description: Machine-readable alert rule definitions for Azure Monitor. DevOps creates these as Azure Monitor alert rules with the specified Action Group.

alertRules.name: hbi-high-adapter-error-rate
alertRules.responseGuidance: Check domain-specific error codes, verify Graph API status, check Redis connectivity

alertRules.name: hbi-adapter-latency-spike
alertRules.condition: p95 > 10s for any domain in 5-min window
alertRules.responseGuidance: Check Graph API latency, Redis cache hit rate, function cold start frequency

alertRules.name: hbi-auth-failure-burst
alertRules.sourceSignal: auth.bearer.error + handler.error where errorCode in (UNAUTHORIZED, FORBIDDEN)
alertRules.responseGuidance: Check MSAL config, verify Azure AD service health, check OBO scope permissions

alertRules.name: hbi-provisioning-saga-failure
alertRules.condition: Any provisioning saga failure event emitted
alertRules.responseGuidance: Check failedAtStep, review step-specific error, assess compensation outcome

alertRules.name: hbi-circuit-breaker-open
alertRules.responseGuidance: Check downstream dependency health, review failure pattern, assess fallback behavior
alertRules.status: DEFERRED — activates after D1 delivers circuit-breaker implementation

actionGroup.name: hbi-alert-action-group
actionGroup.description: Azure Monitor Action Group for HB Intel alerts
actionGroup.note: Office 365 Incoming Webhooks (connectors) are deprecated. Use Teams Workflows via Power Automate per C3 §2.3.3.
